response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong engineering fundamentals, architectural thinking, and 20+ years of diverse software experience, there's a critical skills mismatch. The role requires deep C++ expertise and industrial cybersecurity standards knowledge (SDL, IEC 62443). Bogdan's C++ experience is limited to ~1 year (2007-2008), with his career focused on TypeScript/Node.js, D, and web-based architectures. He lacks demonstrated expertise in MQTT, industrial protocols, and security-critical embedded systems—core requirements for this position.
strengths: Extensive architectural and systems thinking across microservices, event-driven platforms, and high-performance concurrent systems
Proven ability to mentor and communicate technical knowledge through workshops, talks, and open-source contributions
20+ years of software craftsmanship with strong TDD, CI/CD, and agile methodology experience
concerns: Minimal C++ experience (only ~1 year in 2007-2008); career primarily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and D—insufficient for a senior C++ developer role
No demonstrated knowledge of SDL, IEC 62443, or industrial cybersecurity standards—critical requirements for this role
No experience with MQTT, industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, OPC UA), or Azure cloud; background is web/cloud-focused rather than industrial automation
